name: Bonus Font Pack
classification_notes: The pack contains six stylistically distinct display typefaces ranging from a melting bold sans to an ornate italic, making display the only applicable umbrella category.
summary: A bundle of six stylistically varied display fonts from Tropical Type, spanning melting sans, edgy serifs and ornate italics.
description: Six distinct typefaces sold together as a bundle: Soda Sans is a connected melting bold sans, Wranger an all-caps edgy serif, Fender an experimental trippy display, Floss a thin mix-and-match display, Honeychrome Bold a Helvetica alternative with an edge, and Stylebender Contrast Italic an ornate italic suited to pairing with serifs. All fonts include extended Latin glyph coverage and are supplied in OTF, TTF, WOFF, WOFF2 and SVG formats. Full commercial use is included with purchase.
foundry_blurb: Tropical Type describe the Bonus Font Pack as six exciting fonts covering a broad range of styles, from Soda Sans, a melting connected bold sans-serif, through to Stylebender Contrast Italic, a stunning ornate italic that pairs nicely with most serifs. The pack is also offered free when spending over $30 on the site.

name: Bonus Font Pack 1
classification_notes: The page describes a bonus font pack containing multiple typefaces from the Tropical Type catalogue, spanning diverse display styles rather than a single classifiable category.
summary: A promotional multi-font bundle from Tropical Type, offered as a bonus with qualifying purchases rather than as a standalone typeface release.
description: The Bonus Font Pack 1 is a value-added bundle tied to a spending threshold at Tropical Type, rather than a distinct typeface family with its own design brief. The page provides no specific detail about which fonts are included, their weights, or their intended applications. As a promotional product, it reflects the foundry's retail-first approach rather than a considered typographic release.
foundry_blurb: Tropical Type offers this bonus font pack as a complimentary addition to qualifying orders, positioning it as extra value alongside their broader catalogue of affordable, commercially licensed typefaces.

name: Holidaze Display
classification_notes: A decorative display typeface with a deliberate nostalgic, laid-back character suited to posters and merch; its retro aesthetic and informal nature place it firmly in the display category.
summary: A laid-back retro display face with a nostalgic character, offered in Regular and Italic, aimed at band posters, party invites and vintage-style merchandise.
description: Holidaze Display carries a deliberate holiday-era retro warmth, designed for informal, high-impact applications such as gig posters, event invitations and branded merchandise. The family is minimal in its weight range, offering just a Regular and Italic, but covers Latin Extended character sets including accented glyphs for broader European language support. Files ship in OTF, TTF, WOFF, WOFF2 and SVG formats.
foundry_blurb: Tropical Type describe Holidaze Display as a smooth, nostalgic font with a laid-back vibe, positioning it for band posters, party invites and vintage merch. Regular and Italic are included, with files available in OTF, TTF, WOFF, WOFF2 and SVG formats alongside a broad set of non-English accented glyphs.

summary: A mid-century revival display face from Tropical Type, built for headlines and decorative applications with a retro American flavour.

name: Babe Sans
classification_notes: Described as a clean, modern sans with groovy curves and funky alternates, placing it in display sans territory rather than a neutral workhorse grotesque.
summary: A single-weight display sans with deliberately groovy curves and stylistic alternates aimed at branding and social media work.
description: Built for personality over utility, this sans trades neutrality for curvy, characterful letterforms with funky alternates that push it firmly into display territory. Coverage extends to a solid range of Latin Extended glyphs including accented characters for Western and Central European languages. Files ship in OTF, TTF, WOFF, WOFF2 and SVG formats, covering desktop, web and logo use under a tiered commercial licence.
foundry_blurb: Tropical Type describe Babe Sans as cute, bold and curvy, with clean and legible modern sans forms given extra character through groovy curves and funky alternates, making for a unique and memorable font.

name: Willow Sans
classification_notes: A single bold weight with geometric 1970s-influenced forms and experimental outlines places this firmly in display territory rather than a functional text grotesque.
summary: A single-weight geometric display face with 1970s references and experimental outline forms that give it a retro-quirky character.
description: Geometric proportions drawn from 1970s display lettering are combined with more experimental outlines to produce a bold face that reads as nostalgic without feeling purely archival. It ships in OTF, TTF, WOFF, WOFF2 and SVG formats, with a reasonable set of accented Latin glyphs for Western European languages. Best suited to branding, packaging and social graphics where a warm, approachable boldness is wanted.
foundry_blurb: Tropical Type describe Willow Sans as a little cute and a little quirky, with a hint of nostalgia, mixing geometric seventies vibes with modern experimental outlines to create a bold yet approachable typeface.

name: Elysium Display Font
classification_notes: Described explicitly as a modern display caps typeface, combining bold curves with angular details for headline use rather than text setting.
summary: A single-weight all-caps display typeface mixing sweeping curves with sharp angular details for a futurist-with-nostalgia effect.
description: Built for headline and branding use, Elysium pairs bold, rounded strokes with angular cuts to create a tension between retro and forward-looking aesthetics. The family ships with uppercase and lowercase sets alongside alternates for both, plus number alternates, giving some compositional variety within a single weight. Extended Latin diacritics cover a reasonable spread of European languages.
foundry_blurb: Tropical Type describe Elysium as a modern display caps typeface where bold, sweeping curves meet sharp, angular details, contrasting futurism with hints of nostalgia. Files are supplied in OTF, TTF, WOFF, WOFF2 and SVG formats, with uppercase and lowercase alternates and number alternates included.

name: Hand & Heart Font Duo
classification_notes: A duo combining a paper cut-out display face and a dry brush script, both produced by hand. The script nature of both components places this squarely in the script category.
summary: A two-font pairing combining a paper cut-out face and a dry brush script, both made entirely by hand.
description: The duo pairs a paper cut-out letterform style with a dry brush script, offering two contrasting handmade textures that work together in branding and decorative contexts. Each font includes uppercase and lowercase alternates plus number alternates, giving reasonable variety for natural-looking typesetting. Extended Latin glyph support covers a broad range of European languages.
foundry_blurb: Tropical Type describe Hand & Heart as a real handmade font duo, one face cut from paper and the other dry brushed, positioned as a 100% natural alternative for designers wanting to step away from AI-generated aesthetics.

name: Alpha Punk
classification_notes: An experimental display typeface with multiple alternate letterforms per character, designed for wild and unconventional typographic compositions rather than text use.
summary: A display typeface offering four distinct alternate letterforms per character, intended for deliberately chaotic and experimental typographic arrangements.
description: Each letter in Alpha Punk ships with four substantially different design options, accessible via uppercase, lowercase and their respective alternates within the font files. The mix-and-match approach is aimed at designers wanting unpredictable, irregular compositions without manually layering different typefaces. Files are supplied in OTF, TTF, WOFF, WOFF2 and SVG formats, with Latin Extended glyph support covering Polish, French and several other Western European languages.
foundry_blurb: Tropical Type describe Alpha Punk as a Mix and Match font where every letter has four vastly different options to choose from, producing wild and experimental typography. They note that weird is very much in vogue and encourage designers to get creative with the alternates system.
